Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY HEALTH CENTERS GLADSTONE HEALTH CENTER PEDIATRIC CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care for children and youth such as general physicals, vaccinations, treatment of acute and chronic illness, health education, treatment of ADD/ADHD, anxiety and mild to moderate depression. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling.
